name: Chicken with Mexi-Corn Salsa
recipeIngredient: 6 chicken breasts, halves, boned and skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add the chicken and sprinkle with salt. Cook, turning occasionally, for about 6 minutes or until the chicken is light brown on all sides.
3. Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the chicken reaches fork tenderness.
4. Remove the chicken from the pan and place it on a serving platter. Spoon Mexi-Corn Salsa over the chicken.
5. Garnish with cherry tomatoes and cilantro.
See recipe for Mexi-Corn Salsa.
